text:
Yunju (ユンジュ, Yunju) was a centaur-like Chimera Ant Squadron Leader. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 192 

Appearance

Yunju's upper half was that of a muscular man, while his lower half was that of a horse. He had spiky blue hair, red eyes, and a serpentine tongue.

Personality

Yunju showed no regard for the well-being of humans, having no issue enslaving them as dogs, and even killing them if they become annoying to him. He was also confident in his abilities and status as a king, to the point of arrogance. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 79 (2011) 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Yunju with his human pets Spot and Rover confront Gon, Killua, and Kite after they infiltrate his new base of operations, a narcotics factory in NGL. Yunju inquires Kite's group who they are, but when Spot beseeches Kite and the group for help, Yunju crushes Spot's head with his hoof killing him on impact, for being too noisy. Although regretting this for a brief moment, he claims he was getting bored of his pets, causing Rover to panic and beg like a dog to have his life spared. Unamused Yunju kills Rover, as his two comrades Centipede and Mosquito appear from the deeper parts of the factory. Turning his attention to Kite and group; Yunju declares that Kite and group will become new dogs and sends his comrades after them. The comrades were killed by Killua and Kite, and Yunju himself was shot dead in the head by Kite's Nen ability Crazy Slots. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 193 

Yunju is briefly mentioned by Flutter, noting that his signal has disappeared and therefore he must have been killed. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 194 

Abilities & Powers

Yunju's abilities are largely unknown, but as a Squadron Leader, he has a high degree of strength, intelligence, and authority. He can effortlessly crush a human's skull with a stomp. His subordinate Centipede feared his power. However, he was swiftly killed by Kite.
